source_pr.title: ddl: speed up ddl tests
source_pr.body:
<!--
Thank you for contributing to TiDB! Please read TiDB's [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/pingcap/community/blob/master/CONTRIBUTING.md) document **BEFORE** filing this PR.
-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->
```
Local cmd:
go test -v -vet=off -p 5 -timeout 10m  -race -count 1
```
Before this PR:
```
Local:
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl	116.011s
CI:
Race run ddl tests: 2m 22s
```
[CI](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/16964/pipeline/76
)

After this PR:
```
Local:
github.com/pingcap/tidb/ddl	78.218s
CI:
Race run ddl tests: 1m 26s
```
[CI](https://internal.pingcap.net/idc-jenkins/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/16989/pipeline/76)

### What is changed and how it works?

- Make tidb_ddl_error_count_limit small.

- Change multiple insert statements into one.

- Turn down the value of `step`.

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: DDL tests were slow, and the PR restructures/batches test DML to speed up execution; no concrete flaky failure signature is provided.
failure_signature: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: The patch is primarily a performance optimization for DDL tests (batching inserts / reducing work); no targeted stabilization change for flaky behavior is identified.
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR focuses on speeding up DDL tests by batching inserts and reducing per-iteration work. While that can indirectly reduce timeout-like instability, the available case data does not include a concrete intermittent failure signature or a targeted determinism fix, so avoid guessing a schema-race root cause and keep it as needs-more-evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).

evidence: files: ddl/db_integration_test.go, ddl/db_partition_test.go, ddl/db_test.go, ddl/ddl_worker_test.go, ddl/serial_test.go
